strings.welcome:
Welcome to our store! I'm your shopping assistant.
I can help you discover products, track orders, process returns, check loyalty rewards, or connect you with a specialist.
What can I help you with today?
strings.session_goodbye: Thank you for shopping with us! We hope to see you again soon.
strings.handoff_success: I've connected you with the right specialist.
strings.routing_error: I'm having trouble understanding your request. Let me connect you with someone who can help.
